title: CIRES: Critical Infrastructure Resilience Through Edge Computing Systems
summary: Intelligent Edge Orchestration through Resilient Multi-RAT Connectivity.
description: Investigating seamless connectivity through Multi-RAT (Radio Access Technology) integration within the CIRES project. My research focuses on orchestrating diverse access technologies to maintain high-availability edge services, ensuring that Europe's critical infrastructure remains operational despite communication disruptions or resource fluctuations.

title: GSoC 2024: Enhancement of RL Approach Accessibility in NR
summary: Enhancing Reinforcement Learning Integration for 5G LENA in ns-3.
description: Selected for Google Summer of Code 2024 with the ns-3 organization. I developed a standardized RL interface by integrating OpenAI Gym with the ns3-gym module for 5G LENA. My work included implementing a resilient RL-based scheduler, providing a high-fidelity simulation environment for AI-driven radio resource management in next-generation networks.
